boonAirplaneModeDescription: Gains <money>$3</money> of sell value at end of round
boonAllinDescription: Adds <multi>x4 Multi</multi> on final move of round
boonAlphaMaleDescription: Adds the sell value of all other owned Boons to Mult (Currently <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Mult</multi>)
boonAuraDescription: Adds <multi>+32 Multi</multi> on vertical or horizontal match-5
boonAutocorrectDescription: <chance>1 in 10 chance</chance> to upgrade the item of the first match of the move
boonBackstabberDescription: Disables effect of every Boss round
boonBasedDescription: All horizontal and vertical match-5 become Gold tiles.
boonBlockDescription: Adds <point>+80 Points</point> on vertical or horizontal match-4
boonBoomerDescription: Adds one ${loc:cellFloor_bonusPoints_name} tile to the board at the end of each round
boonBrainLagDescription: Adds <multi>x${arg:scoreCalculationValue1}</multi> at the end of each move
boonBrainrotDescription: <chance>1 in 10 chance</chance> to gain <multi>+10 Mult</multi> every move (Currently <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1}</multi>)
boonBroDescription: Adds <multi>+3 Multi</multi> for each Vibe (Currently <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Multi</multi>)
boonBuzzDescription: Add <money>$1</money> of sell value to every Vibe and Consumable at end of round
boonCancelledDescription: Adds <multi>+1 Mult</multi> for every item sold (Currently <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Mult</multi>)
boonClickbaitDescription: Adds <multi>+2 Multi</multi> for each shop reroll this run (currently <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Multi</multi>)
boonClipItDescription: Adds <point>+120 Points</point> on vertical or horizontal match-5
boonConspiracistDescription: Adds <multi>x4 Mult</multi> if you have at least 16 Enhanced tiles on your board (Currently <multi>${arg:scoreCalculationValue1}</multi>)
boonCookieTimeDescription: Earn <money>$1</money> at end of round. Increases by <money>$2</money> when a Boss is defeated
boonCookedDescription: Adds <multi>x4 Mult</multi> for each vertical or horizontal match-4
boonCopypastaDescription: Adds <multi>+12 Multi</multi> if the move has two match-3
boonCryptoBroDescription: Earn <money>$4</money> when skipping a round and increase this value by <money>$4</money> (currently <money>$${arg:scoreCalculationValue1}</money>).
boonDarwinDescription: Gains <multi>x0.25 Mult</multi> every time an item is upgraded (Currently <multi>x${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Mult</multi>)
boonDeepDiveDescription: Gives <point>+20 Points</point> for each ${loc:cellFloor_bonusPoints_name} tile on your board (Currently <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point>)
boonDeluluDescription: Adds <multi>x0.1 Mult</multi> for every purchase from the shop (Currently <multi>x${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Mult</multi>)
boonDepressionDescription: Adds <multi>x3 Multi</multi> on each move while you have <money>$4</money> or less.
boonDndDescription: Adds <multi>x1 Mult</multi> for each empty Vibe slot included (Currently <multi>x${arg:scoreCalculationValue1}</multi>)
boonDoubleDownDescription: Gain <money>$10</money> at the end of the round. <chance>1 in 3 chance</chance> this vibe is destroyed at end of round.
boonEchoChamberDescription: Adds <point>+80 points</point> if the move has two match-3
boonFirstbornDescription: Adds <point>+40 Points</point> per empty Vibe slot (Currently <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point>)
boonFourthWallDescription: Adds <multi>+20 Multi</multi> on vertical or horizontal match-4
boonFriendzonedDescription: Adds <multi>x3 Mult</multi> for each vertical or horizontal match-3
boonFreezeDescription: Adds <multi>+4 Mult</multi> for each Cold colored item cleared this move (Green, Blue, Purple)
boonGlitchDescription: Adds <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Multi</multi> at the end of each move
boonGlowUpDescription: Gains <point>+3 Points</point> for each move remaining at end of round ( Currently <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1}</point> ).
boonGriefingDescription: Before Enhanced tiles score, removes them and gains <multi>x0.1 Mult</multi> each (Currently <multi>x${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Mult</multi>)
boonGodmodeDescription: Adds <multi>x4 Multi</multi>, <chance>1 in 1000 chance</chance> this vibe is destroyed at the end of round
boonHardStuckDescription: Adds <shuffle>+1 Shuffles</shuffle> each round, Removes <move>-2 moves</move> each round
boonHotDescription: Adds <point>+21 Points</point> for each Warm colored item cleared this move (Red, Orange, Pink)
boonHustlerDescription: Adds <multi>+2 Mult</multi> for every <money>$5</money> you have (Currently <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Mult</multi>)
boonHypeTrainDescription: When a new round starts, adds two random Common Vibes.
boonLeakDescription: <chance>1 in 5 chance</chance> to gain <shuffle>+1 Shuffle</shuffle> at the end of a move
boonLooksmaxxingDescription: Gains <multi>x0.25 Mult</multi> every time an Enhanced tile is added to Board (Currently <multi>x${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Mult</multi>)
boonLockedInDescription: Retrigger all Tile Effects in grid
boonLowBatteryDescription: Adds <multi>+20 Mult</multi> if total items destroyed in a move are 3 or less
boonManifestationDescription: While active, you may be offered things you already own, boons, consumables, etc.
boonMeowDescription: Gains <multi>x0.25 Mult</multi> every time a Lucky tile successfully triggers (Currently <multi>x${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Mult</multi>)
boonMewingDescription: Adds <point>+15 Points</point> at end of each move for every match-5 ( currently <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point>)
boonMutedDescription: Adds <point>+60 points</point> if the move clears only one color
boonNerdDescription: Adds <multi>+16 Multi</multi> if the move clears only one color
boonOffgridDescription: Adds <point>+1 Points</point> per item on board at end of each move ( Currently <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point> )
boonOpaDescription: Each move with two match-3 adds <multi>+2 Multi</multi> for the rest of the run (currently <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Multi</multi>)
boonOversharingDescription: Adds <multi>+1 Mult</multi> for each consumable used this run (Currently <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Mult</multi>)
boonPartyAnimalDescription: Gain <move>+3 Moves</move> and <shuffle>+1 Shuffle</shuffle> at the start of each round. <chance>1 in 4 chance</chance> this vibe is destroyed at the end of a round
boonPassiveIncomeDescription: Earn a random <money>$1–$9</money> at end of round
boonPlotArmorDescription: Gains <point>+2 Points</point> per <shuffle>Shuffle</shuffle> used this run (Currently <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point>)
boonQuietQuittingDescription: Adds <multi>+15 Multi</multi>. <chance>1 in 6 chance</chance> this vibe is destroyed at the end of round
boonRedFlagDescription: Destroys a random Enhanced Tile on the Board at the end of the round, and gain <multi>x0.5 Mult</multi> (Currently <multi>x${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Mult</multi>)
boonRizzDescription: First match each move gives x2 Mult
boonSaltyDescription: Gains <multi>+0.1 Mult</multi> when a Steel tile applies (Currently <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Mult</multi>)
boonSideHustleDescription: While active, if you have <money>$4</money> or less after a move, <chance>1 in 3 chance</chance> to gain a random consumable. Types you already own are skipped unless duplicate catalog offers are allowed.
boonSigmaMaleDescription: Adds <point>+2 Points</point> for each <money>$1</money> you have (Currently <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point>)
boonSimpDescription: When round starts, gain <move>+5 Moves</move> and lose <shuffle>all Shuffles</shuffle>
boonSkillIssueDescription: Adds <multi>x5 Mult</multi> for each vertical or horizontal match-5
boonSlayDescription: Gains <multi>x1 Mult</multi> every 40 items destroyed (Currently <multi>x${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Mult</multi>)
boonSleeperDescription: Earn <money>$2</money> per <shuffle>shuffle</shuffle> if no <shuffle>shuffles</shuffle> are used by end of the round
boonSlopDescription: Adds <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point> at the end of each move
boonSpeedrunDescription: Adds <multi>x0.25 Mult</multi> for each Round skipped this run (Currently <multi>x${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Mult</multi>)
boonSuperheroDescription: Gives <multi>x0.5 Mult</multi> for each Steel tile on the board (Currently <multi>x${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Mult</multi>)
boonSusDescription: Adds <multi>x2 Mult</multi> on the first move of the round
boonWildTakeDescription: Adds <point>+150 Points</point>. <chance>1 in 6 chance</chance> this vibe is destroyed at the end of round
